control define [362..778)
  branch [362..400) "{{- define \"cert-manager.fullname\" -}}"
    control if [401..766)
      branch [401..436) "{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride -}}"
        output [437..497) "{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix \"-\" -}}"
      branch [498..510) "{{- else -}}"
        opaque assign [511..568) "{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride -}}"
        control if [569..754)
          branch [569..608) "{{- if contains $name .Release.Name -}}"
            output [609..658) "{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix \"-\" -}}"
          branch [659..671) "{{- else -}}"
            output [672..742) "{{- printf \"%s-%s\" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix \"-\" -}}"

control define [5803..6121)
  branch [5803..5825) "{{- define \"image\" -}}"
    opaque assign [5826..5858) "{{- $defaultTag := index . 1 -}}"
    control with [5859..6110)
      branch [5859..5881) "{{- with index . 0 -}}"
        control if [5882..5986)
          branch [5882..5902) "{{- if .registry -}}"
            output [5902..5944) "{{ printf \"%s/%s\" .registry .repository }}"
          branch [5944..5956) "{{- else -}}"
            output [5956..5975) "{{- .repository -}}"
        control if [5987..6099)
          branch [5987..6005) "{{- if .digest -}}"
            output [6005..6031) "{{ printf \"@%s\" .digest }}"
          branch [6031..6043) "{{- else -}}"
            output [6043..6088) "{{ printf \":%s\" (default $defaultTag .tag) }}"

opaque template-comment [6435..6643) "{{/*\nCheck that the user has not set both .installCRDs and .crds.enabled or\nset .installCRDs and disabled .crds.keep.\n.installCRDs is deprecated and users should use .crds.enabled and .crds.keep instead.\n*/}}"
scalar [6440..6510) indent=0 "⟦{{/*\nCheck that the user has not set both .installCRDs and .crds.enabled or\nset .installCRDs and disabled .crds.keep.\n.installCRDs is deprecated and users should use .crds.enabled and .crds.keep instead.\n*/}}⟧"

scalar [6553..6638) indent=0 "⟦{{/*\nCheck that the user has not set both .installCRDs and .crds.enabled or\nset .installCRDs and disabled .crds.keep.\n.installCRDs is deprecated and users should use .crds.enabled and .crds.keep instead.\n*/}}⟧"
scalar [6639..6643) indent=0 "⟦{{/*\nCheck that the user has not set both .installCRDs and .crds.enabled or\nset .installCRDs and disabled .crds.keep.\n.installCRDs is deprecated and users should use .crds.enabled and .crds.keep instead.\n*/}}⟧"
control define [6644..7093)
  branch [6644..6683) "{{- define \"cert-manager.crd-check\" -}}"
    control if [6686..6885)
      branch [6686..6744) "{{- if and (.Values.installCRDs) (.Values.crds.enabled) }}"
        output [6749..6872) "{{- fail \"ERROR: the deprecated .installCRDs option cannot be enabled at the same time as its replacement .crds.enabled\" }}"
    control if [6888..7081)
      branch [6888..6947) "{{- if and (.Values.installCRDs) (not .Values.crds.keep) }}"
        output [6952..7068) "{{- fail \"ERROR: .crds.keep is not compatible with .installCRDs, please use .crds.enabled and .crds.keep instead\" }}"
